steps.t: The dead Angmarim can be found at Khorroz in Máttugard. You should search the corpse for additional information as to the Angmarim's presence here.
Dead Angmarim can be found at Khorroz in Máttugard. You should burn the Angmarim corpses at Khorroz.
Voices can be heard at Khorroz in Máttugard. You should investigate the voices heard in Khorroz.
Voices can be heard at Khorroz in Máttugard. You should investigate the voices heard in Khorroz.
Iron Crown Sentinels can be found at Khorroz in Máttugard. You should defeat the Iron Crown Sentinels and destroy any evidence of your deeds.
Prince Ingór can be found at Maergrind and Lóssi can be found at Imrêkh-guthlu. You should talk to Prince Ingór or Lóssi.
